name: Crown Intelligence
tagline: Premium AI systems, automation, positioning, and operator-grade growth infrastructure.
currentMandate: Build the brand, install the operating system, and convert strategic attention into booked calls and retained client work.
stageSummary: Crown Intelligence is past pure concept stage and now assembling the assets, offers, and operating rhythm required for a repeatable premium consulting business.
focus: AI consulting offers and strategic retainers
Content, outreach, and lead generation infrastructure
priorities: Lock a simple premium offer stack with clear outcomes and pricing logic
Build enough proof, assets, and diagnostics to make calls easier to convert
Stand up acquisition systems that do not rely on ad-hoc founder energy
bottlenecks: Offer language still stronger than proof density
Lead generation rhythm not fully systemised yet
Internal ops visibility improving but not yet complete

offers.name: AI Strategy Call
offers.detail: Paid or high-intent diagnostic session focused on bottlenecks, leverage, and deployment path.

offers.name: OpenClaw Deployment
offers.detail: Hands-on implementation and systems setup for operators who need buildout, not just advice.

offers.name: Strategic Retainer
offers.detail: Ongoing operator-level advisory and system refinement for businesses building long-term leverage.
